front: What is the significance of Veni Vidi Vici for peptide science?
back: Veni Vidi Vici (3 peptides, 3 letters) represents the simplicity and power of peptide nomenclature. The three-letter amino acid code (IUPAC-IUBMB, 1983) standardized peptide sequences globally. Single-letter code (1960s) enabled computational analysis. Both are foundational to bioinformatics and peptide databases (UniProt, PDB).
